DISCOVERY 302, SEP-01-2023. RE: DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION'S MOTION TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ADMITTED AND SANCTIONS. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION NOS. 1-7 SHALL BE DEEMED ADMITTED. PLAINTIFF EDNA LOTA SHALL PAY SANCTIONS OF $750 TO CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION WITHIN 20 DAYS. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT AARON@MINNISANDSMALLETS.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: AARON MINNIS. CLERK: R. WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Defendant California Deparment Of Transportation'S Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted And Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION's Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted And Sanctions.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts the tentative ruling. Granted, no opposition filed. Requests for admission nos. 1-7 shall be deemed admitted. Plaintiff Edna Lota shall pay sanctions of $750 to California Department of Transportation within 20 days.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at aaron@minnisandsmallets.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Aug-02-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Steven Mills, Esq. for moving party/Defendant, City and County of San Francisco.
No other appearances.

The jury trial date is continued to Oct-14-2024 per agreement of parties and there will be no further continuances due to scheduling conflicts.

Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)
